# SOPMaster
> Professional operational documentation platform for consultants, consultancy firms and documentation professionals. Create, manage and maintain structured Standard Operating Procedures, operational checklists and department-level documentation.

## Platform
- SOP Builder: https://sopmaster.tech/forge
- Checklist Builder: https://sopmaster.tech/checklist
- Batch Generator: https://sopmaster.tech/batch
- Document Vault: https://sopmaster.tech/armory
- Administration: https://sopmaster.tech/settings

## Company
- About: https://sopmaster.tech/about
- Contact: https://sopmaster.tech/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://sopmaster.tech/privacy
- Terms & Conditions: https://sopmaster.tech/terms

## Auth
- Login: https://sopmaster.tech/login
- Register: https://sopmaster.tech/register

## Pricing
- Solo Professional - £400/mo: 300 credits
- Small Consultancy - £2,500/mo: 2,500 credits
- Medium Consultancy - £5,100/mo: 6,000 credits
- Large Consultancy - £9,000/mo: 12,000 credits
